notes: 2026-06-11 GPU1 loop-time conditioning h96 mechanism run: added generic LOOP_TIME_SCALE=1 sinusoidal loop-phase conditioning to the clean D256/L12/loop5 12x12 h96 curriculum. Result is negative for final frontier despite active use of the signal. h72/h84/h96/h108 loop5 exact=0.8542/0.4115/0.0052/0.0000 versus clean h96 baseline 0.8750/0.4740/0.0104/0.0000. h96 loop1 blank_acc improves 0.4211->0.5102, but loop5 blank_acc drops 0.7769->0.7549 and h96 exact halves. Train CE ends slightly lower, 0.3667 vs 0.3931, so this is not a simple optimization failure. Lesson: a loop clock makes early predictions stronger but does not fix late global consistency. Decision: stop loop-time/feedback scale sweeps; next useful mechanism must change late-loop state revision or spend more clean h96 hard-stage compute.
